name: ui-visual-novel-board
description: VisualNovelBoard — game-shell composition: dialogue-bubble atom for speaker/text/portrait; LOLO drives CHOOSE/ADVANCE.

schema.name: ui-visual-novel-board
schema.description: VisualNovelBoard — game-shell composition: dialogue-bubble atom for speaker/text/portrait; LOLO drives CHOOSE/ADVANCE.

emits.description: Emits UI:{chooseEvent} with {nextId} when the player selects a branching choice
Emits UI:{advanceEvent} with {} to advance to the next node
Emits UI:{restartEvent} with {} to reset the scene to the start node

events.name: Choose
events.description: Emits UI:{chooseEvent} with {nextId} when the player selects a branching choice

events.name: Advance
events.description: Emits UI:{advanceEvent} with {} to advance to the next node

events.name: Restart
events.description: Emits UI:{restartEvent} with {} to reset the scene to the start node

effects.speaker: Narrator
effects.text: The corridor stretches into shadow. A lone sentinel blocks your path.

effects.speaker: Sentinel
effects.text: You carry the old marks. Speak your purpose, traveler.

effects.speaker: Narrator
effects.text: You withdraw into the dark. The path will wait for braver feet.
Then the way is open. Walk it well.
effects.speaker: Sentinel

nodes.label: Nodes
nodes.description: Dialogue graph: each node has speaker text, scene/portrait keys, and branching choices.

portraitUrl.label: Portrait Url
portraitUrl.description: Large character portrait rendered standing over the scene.

startNodeId.label: Start Node Id
startNodeId.description: Id of the dialogue node shown first / on restart

typewriterSpeed.label: Typewriter Speed
typewriterSpeed.description: Milliseconds per character of dialogue text reveal (0 = instant)
